reflection.candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows high conviction but green_matches=0, treat the signal as historically un-anchored and cut size, not as a high-confidence entry.
reflection.mechanism: green_matches counts how many times the current live indicator configuration has previously resolved into a profitable forward outcome. When conviction is high (e.g. AUDUSD 100%, USDJPY 83%) but green_matches=0, the system is extrapolating from an indicator alignment that has no validated historical analog — institutional flow may be transient noise that the indicator stack mistakes for a regime. High conviction with zero matched precedent is the signature of an over-fit live snapshot, not a durable edge.
reflection.testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.80 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.5  # require historical anchor before full size

validation.reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
